query: light leak film burn red orange flare expired film
message: sub:film_artifacts/light_leak — anti_aesthetic — color casts, lens flare, expired film color shifts

response.objective_caption: A brilliant circular light source dominates the center of a dark field, radiating from an intense white core through yellow, orange, and red halos into deep black surroundings. A faint square boundary encloses the central glow. Thin, irregular linear marks and scattered particles appear across the surrounding dark surface. Narrow bright bands run along the top and bottom edges of the inner square, with additional small bright areas visible along the sides. The outer perimeter remains in near-total darkness.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily degraded analog film frame captures an extremely overexposed circular light source at its center, with highlights blown out into a blinding white core bleeding into red and orange halos against crushed black shadows. Heavy film artifacts including scratches, dust, and organic surface texture cover the image, alongside simulated light leaks streaking along the edges of the inner frame. The deliberate analog decay and tarnished surface evoke entropy and neglect, while the suffocating darkness and intense red glow create an atmosphere of dread and distress.
